# hamforge

> hamforge is a product studio building practical software for developers and marketers.

This site is a simple landing page that explains what hamforge is, what it is building, and how to get in touch.

## Pages

- [Home](https://hamforge.dev/): Main landing page with the studio overview, roadmap, and product summaries.

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/hamforge): The hamforge GitHub organisation linked from the homepage.
